overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a player walking through a dystopian urban plaza, ascending a graffiti-covered stairway, and emerging onto a vibrant neon-lit downtown street with heavy cyberpunk aesthetic and moderate traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza with vending area

agents.ego_description: walking through the plaza toward a staircase entrance

entered.detail: illuminated vending machine with bright advertisement display
large overhead digital screen showing colorful advertisements
turquoise colored benches lining the walkway
concrete wall with prominent NO FUTURE graffiti tag
open concrete pedestrian area with scattered debris and papers

segments.scene_description: The player walks through a dimly lit urban plaza at night, approaching a staircase. A vending machine and turquoise benches line the path, while a large digital billboard hangs overhead. The area is quiet with no visible pedestrians.

events.description: enters covered stairway from open plaza

agents.ego_description: climbing the concrete stairs in a narrow passage between graffiti-covered walls

entered.detail: wide concrete stairs ascending between enclosing walls
walls on both sides covered in colorful graffiti tags and street art
harsh fluorescent tube lighting mounted on the stair walls
large industrial pipes running vertically along the wall

segments.scene_description: The player enters a narrow, enclosed stairway illuminated by harsh fluorescent lights. The walls are covered in dense graffiti and industrial pipes run vertically. The space is empty of other people as the player ascends the concrete steps.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper stairway with traditional gate entrance

events.description: encounters pedestrians descending while ascending the stairs
approaching exit with bright neon light visible from street level

agents.ego_description: continuing up stairs while passing other pedestrians moving in the opposite direction

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in pink shirt descending the stairs
pedestrian in blue vest ascending ahead of the player

entered.detail: ornate traditional gate structure marking the exit to street level
traditional red paper lanterns hanging from the gate structure
large digital billboard with purple frame showing advertisement

segments.scene_description: As the player ascends the upper portion of the stairs, other pedestrians appear, including one in a pink shirt descending. A traditional Chinese gate with red lanterns becomes visible at the exit, along with a large purple billboard. The lighting shifts from artificial to mixed as the street exit approaches.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy downtown intersection with neon signage

events.description: exits stairway onto busy neon-lit street with heavy traffic
crossing the street with a group of pedestrians while cars wait at the intersection

agents.ego_description: crossing the intersection with a group of pedestrians among waiting traffic

notable_agents.action: blue sports car waiting at the intersection
red sedan stopped at the crosswalk

entered.detail: large red neon sign reading CAPITOLA extending over the street
blue neon sign for 24/7 STORE on building facade
multiple large digital billboards with bright neon advertisements on surrounding buildings
tall futuristic skyscrapers with illuminated windows rising in the background
yellow striped pedestrian crosswalk markings on the asphalt

segments.scene_description: The player exits the stairway into a vibrant, neon-drenched downtown intersection. The CAPITOLA sign and 24/7 STORE sign glow brightly among towering skyscrapers. The player crosses the street with a crowd of pedestrians while a blue sports car and red sedan wait at the crosswalk, surrounded by the bustling cyberpunk city atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a quiet, dimly lit urban plaza into the overwhelming neon vibrancy of a bustling downtown intersection. It begins by moving past turquoise benches and a large digital billboard toward a concrete staircase, transitioning from the open plaza into a narrow, enclosed stairwell defined by harsh fluorescent lighting, industrial pipes, and graffiti-covered walls. As the camera ascends, the isolation fades and the environment opens up, revealing descending pedestrians and the glow of red lanterns from a traditional Chinese gate. The scene then shifts from the artificial tunnel light into a saturated cityscape as the player emerges onto a crowded street. Finally, the view expands to encompass towering skyscrapers and glowing signs for CAPITOLA and a 24/7 STORE, with a blue sports car and red sedan idling amidst the dense cyberpunk traffic.
